apartments.name: Modern 2BR Steps to Beach
apartments.shortDescription: Set on Trumpeldor Street just steps from the beach, this bright 2-bedroom apartment offers a relaxed and modern stay for up to 5 guests. With its sea view, private balcony, and fully renovated design, it’s the perfect…
apartments.fullDescription:
Set on Trumpeldor Street just steps from the beach, this bright 2-bedroom apartment offers a relaxed and modern stay for up to 5 guests. With its sea view, private balcony, and fully renovated design, it’s the perfect spot to enjoy Tel Aviv’s coastal lifestyle in comfort and style. A bright, easygoing seaside home 🌊 Located on the 4th floor of a well-kept building, this freshly renovated apartment blends modern design with a relaxed coastal vibe. Natural light, sea breeze, and clean interiors set the tone for your stay. Wake up, open the balcony doors, and enjoy the sea view right from your living space. ✨ Inside the apartment:
• 🌅 Private balcony with open sea view
• Spacious, light-filled living area
• 🛏️ 2 comfortable bedrooms for up to 5 guests
• 🚿 1 modern bathroom
• 🍳 Fully equipped kitchen with sleek finishes
• 🪞 Fresh, minimalist renovation throughout 📍 The location:
Right on Trumpeldor, you’re a few steps from the beach and surrounded by cafés, bakeries, and the best of Tel Aviv’s seaside energy. 🏢 Building:
• 4th floor
• Elevator in the building 🔐 Security:
• Miklat (secured shelter) available in the building 🌆 Good to know:
The area is central and lively, with the natural energy of the city and occasional urban noise. 💙 What makes it special:
• True sea view from the balcony
• Clean, modern, fully renovated feel
• Walkable beach lifestyle
• Perfect base for families or small groups 🚗 Parking:
No private parking. Several public parking solutions are available nearby within walking distance. Trumpeldor is one of Tel Aviv’s most iconic beachside streets. You’re right between the sea and the city — meaning you can start your morning at the beach, grab coffee in a local café, and walk straight into the heart of Tel Aviv in minutes.

Cafés, restaurants, Dizengoff Street, and luxury hotels (Carlton, Renaissance) are all within walking distance.

apartments.name: Eucalyptus Villa in Neve Tzedek
apartments.shortDescription: Experience true luxury and zen at the award-winning Eucalyptus House, a magnificent 400 sq.m house with concrete walls and floors, private rooftop
apartments.fullDescription: Experience true luxury and zen at the award-winning Eucalyptus House, a magnificent 400 sq.m house with concrete walls and floors, private rooftop The Eucalyptus House is an architectural masterpiece with a total area of 400 square meters, which includes 5 great sized bedrooms and 4 modern bathrooms. As you enter, you'll find yourself in a bright and spacious living room that is flooded with natural light. The living room features sleek contemporary furniture, beautiful decor, and large windows that open out to the private garden, allowing the outdoors to flow seamlessly into the interior. The living room is connected to the dining room, which features a large table and chairs that can comfortably seat up to 10 guests. This is the perfect spot to enjoy a delicious meal with family and friends, while taking in the beautiful views of the garden. The house is organised over three floors, with living spaces on the ground floor and three bedrooms on the two storeys above. These floor levels are staggered, to work with a slight level change across the site. The interior design of the house is characterized by clean lines, minimalism, and a beautiful combination of natural materials such as concrete, wood, and metal. One of the main features of the house is the beautiful eucalyptus tree in the private garden, which is believed to be one of the oldest eucalyptus trees in the area. The house is built around the tree, and you can see the trunk and foliage from several different rooms. The house is equipped with state-of-the-art amenities, including a fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances, a private rooftop with a wonderful outdoor dining area. With so much space and luxurious amenities, this home is perfect for families or groups of friends looking for an unforgettable stay in the heart of Tel Aviv. 🚜 #pay attention# there is a loud construction works next to the house Neve Tzedek is one of the most charming and picturesque neighborhoods in Tel Aviv, known for its narrow streets lined with pastel-colored buildings and historic architecture. It is located just south of the bustling Carmel Market and adjacent to the trendy Florentine neighborhood. Neve Tzedek was the first neighborhood built outside of the ancient port city of Jaffa, established in the late 1800s by a group of Jewish immigrants. The name "Neve Tzedek" means "Oasis of Justice" and was inspired by the biblical phrase "And I will betroth you to me in righteousness and in justice and in loving-kindness and in compassion." Today, Neve Tzedek is home to an eclectic mix of boutique shops, trendy cafes, art galleries, and high-end restaurants. It's also a cultural hub, hosting events such as the Tel Aviv International Dance Festival and the Suzanne Dellal Center for Dance and Theater. Despite its trendy and vibrant atmosphere, Neve Tzedek has managed to preserve its unique character and historic charm, making it a sought-after destination for both locals and tourists alike.

Guests will love the renovated apartment with its modern furnishings and inviting atmosphere. The highlight of this penthouse is the expansive balcony, perfect for lounging, dining, or simply soaking in the vibrant energy of the city. The balcony is equipped with good quality outdoor furniture, providing a comfortable space to unwind. Additionally, the property's proximity to Rothschild Boulevard allows guests to easily explore the trendy shops, cafes, and nightlife of this iconic area. Located in the vibrant Rothschild area, this penthouse apartment offers easy access to the best of Tel Aviv. The neighborhood is known for its lively atmosphere, trendy bars, boutique shops, and renowned restaurants. Rothschild Boulevard, just a stone's throw away, is a bustling hub of activity, where you can enjoy a leisurely stroll or find a cozy spot for a cup of coffee. The area is well-connected, with convenient access to public transportation, making it easy to explore other parts of the city and its famous attractions.

Located in the spot where loads of neighbourhoods intersect, the apartment is within close proximity to boho-chic Neve Tzedek, cosmopolitan Rothschild Boulevard and bustling Carmel Market. It’s got a luxurious feel to it - and let’s not forget about the gigantic windows and charming balcony that offer gorgeous views of Tel Aviv’s fast-changing cityscape. This flat conveniently located in the heart of Tel Aviv is ideal for business people seeking easy access to the business neighborhood on Rothschild Boulevard as well as holiday makers who are more interested by the famous beaches, the trendy shops of Neve Tzedek or the atmosphere of the Carmel Market, as well as the restaurants and bars. Nachalt Binyamin is a winding, tree-lined street that runs through Tel-Aviv and boasts some of the city’s best restaurants, bars, and shops. Its colourful appearance offers an escape from hectic Allenby Street, which runs parallel to Nachalt Binyamin and is of a much noisier and busier character. Nachalt Binyamin is especially known for its weekly arts and crafts market that’s been an integral part of the street’s livelihood since it opened in 1988. Every Tuesday and Friday, the street transforms into a creative cluster of local artists selling and showcasing an array of their creations from stained glass mezuzahs and handmade jewellery to beautifully carved wooden boxes.

apartments.fullDescription:
Haifa hospitality, redefined. Discover a chic designer studio tucked away on peaceful Ekron Street. We’ve found the sweet spot between the vibrant art of Wadi Nisnas and the raw energy of the Talpiot Market. Need to crush some goals? Our lightning-fast Wi-Fi has you covered. Ready to explore? Hadar’s nightlife is right at your doorstep. With sleek minimalist design and an ultra-comfortable bed, this isn't just a place to stay-it’s your Haifa basecamp. Located on the top floor, this thoughtfully designed 2-bedroom apartment offers comfort, privacy, and a truly rare Haifa experience—complete with exclusive access to a private rooftop boasting panoramic 360° city and sea views.
Inside, the space blends natural textures and soft tones for a calm, inviting atmosphere. The living area features a cozy single sofa bed, adjacent to a compact dining nook and a fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances including a Nespresso machine, and toaster oven. Bedroom one includes a queen-size bed, while the second bedroom doubles as a relaxing lounge with a comfortable double sofa bed. Step outside onto the sunlit balcony, where potted plants and lounge chairs frame the Mediterranean horizon. From there, stairs lead up to the private rooftop terrace—a standout feature that offers sweeping views perfect for coffee at sunrise or a quiet evening wind-down. Additional comforts include an ironing essentials, room-darkening shades, and a 4-person occupancy limit (plus sofa bed). The apartment includes a Mamad (safe room) for your safety and peace of mind. Whether you're traveling as a small family or a couple of friends, this apartment’s rooftop charm and well-planned interior make it a great base for enjoying Tel Aviv like a local.

A modern bathroom with a walk-in shower and neutral finishes completes the space. Guests benefit from free private parking and quick access to Poleg Beach—just a short walk away. apartments.fullDescription: Welcome to our brand-new 3-bedroom villa-style apartment located in the vibrant new Achziv neighborhood—just a short stroll from the beach and the stunning blue lagoons of Israel’s northern coastline. This stylishly designed apartment offers a serene escape with a clean, contemporary look that blends neutral tones with hand-picked décor. Every corner is thoughtfully curated, from the cozy living area to the fully equipped kitchen and spacious bedrooms. The open-plan living space invites you to unwind with a comfortable sofa, modern dining area, and large windows that fill the room with natural light. Step out onto the private balcony to enjoy sweeping views of the sea and surrounding landscape—perfect for morning coffee or sunset relaxation. The bedrooms feature quality bedding, ambient lighting, and smart storage, ideal for couples, families, or small groups seeking a relaxing retreat. The building is set in a peaceful area, yet close to local attractions, making it a convenient base for exploring the beauty of the western Galilee. Whether you’re here to soak in the sun, walk along the beach, or simply relax in a well-designed space, this apartment offers a refreshing stay with the feel of an international getaway—right here in Israel. The apartment includes a Mamad (safe room) for your safety and peace of mind. Your stay includes WiFi and air conditioning,. We look forward to hosting you!

The apartment includes a Mamad (safe room) for your safety and peace of mind. Whether you're sipping coffee on the balcony, enjoying a family meal, or spending the day by the pool, this villa provides everything you need for a comfortable and memorable stay.

Step outside to your private backyard garden—lush with greenery and perfect for outdoor dining or simply enjoying the fresh air. Located in one of Haifa’s most authentic neighborhoods, you’re surrounded by market stalls, cafés, and local eateries, offering a true taste of the city’s culture. Whether you’re here for a short visit or a longer stay, this apartment blends style, comfort, and location for a memorable experience.

apartments.name: Coconut WayWay Paradise Retreat
apartments.shortDescription: Welcome to Coconut Lane, a boutique complex thoughtfully designed for comfort and balance. Each private unit is thoughtfully arranged over two levels. The ground floor includes a bright living area with a sofa and a…
apartments.fullDescription:
Welcome to Coconut Lane, a boutique complex thoughtfully designed for comfort and balance. Each private unit is thoughtfully arranged over two levels. The ground floor includes a bright living area with a sofa and a 50-inch TV, a dining nook, and a fully equipped kitchenette with refrigerator, stove, and coffee setup. The bathroom features a modern walk-in shower. Upstairs, the mezzanine bedroom with a double bed offers a cozy retreat under warm wooden ceilings. Large windows keep the space filled with natural light, while modern furnishings make it easy to settle in for both work and leisure. Beyond your unit, the complex offers shared wellness facilities to support a balanced lifestyle. A gym, sauna, and ice bath will be at your disposal—ideal for unwinding after a day of exploring or keeping up with your routine. Located in Coconut Lane, the property strikes the right balance between convenience and tranquility. You’ll enjoy a peaceful atmosphere while staying close to Koh Phangan’s beaches, markets, and cafés, all just a short ride away. Whether you’re here to work remotely or take a short island break, this boutique stay provides the comfort of a private home with the added benefit of wellness amenities in a central, quiet setting. Please note that the access road to the complex is a flat, off-road path. It is easy to navigate and suitable for standard vehicles. Please note: There is ongoing construction in the surrounding area (not within the complex itself). The work is expected to be completed by early to mid-October. Security Deposit Notice
A refundable security deposit of 10,000 THB is required upon check-in. The deposit will be returned in full at check-out, provided no damages or incidental charges apply.
amenities: essentials (towels, pillows, bed linen, soap, toilet paper)

apartments.fullDescription: Discover a charming retreat in the heart of Ein Kerem, Jerusalem. This welcoming vacation home features two cozy bedrooms, a spacious living room with colorful stained-glass windows, and an equipped kitchen for home-style meals. Step outside to enjoy two large balconies with sweeping views of the mountains, valleys, and the iconic church spires of Ein Kerem. One terrace includes a private jacuzzi along with a sitting and dining area—perfect for relaxing sunsets or peaceful mornings with coffee. The house comfortably accommodates up to four guests. For your convenience, it includes a washing machine, dryer, microwave, toaster, kettle, Nespresso machine, vacuum cleaner, refrigerator, and a 50-inch smart TV. Set within one of Jerusalem’s most picturesque neighborhoods, you’ll be surrounded by stone houses, historic churches, art galleries, and an excellent choice of local cafés and restaurants. Ein Kerem offers a unique mix of tranquility, culture, and authentic Jerusalem atmosphere. Please note: the house is only accessible by stairs and may not be suitable for guests with wheelchairs or limited mobility. Book your stay and enjoy comfort, local charm, and some of the best views Jerusalem has to offer.

apartments.name: Wok Tum Sunset Paradise Villa
apartments.shortDescription: Experience modern tropical living in this private three-bedroom villa overlooking the jungle and sea in Koh Phangan. Located in Wok Tum, one of the island’s most sought-after areas, the villa is just a short drive from…
apartments.fullDescription:
Experience modern tropical living in this private three-bedroom villa overlooking the jungle and sea in Koh Phangan. Located in Wok Tum, one of the island’s most sought-after areas, the villa is just a short drive from the beach, restaurants, and town—yet feels peaceful and secluded. Designed with natural textures, soft tones, and thoughtful details, the villa offers a warm and relaxing atmosphere. The open-plan living room features large glass doors that frame panoramic views and connect seamlessly to the outdoor terrace. The fully equipped kitchen includes a stove, oven, refrigerator, dishwasher, microwave, blender, and espresso machine—ideal for cooking at home. A dining area and indoor lounge make it easy to unwind together. Each of the three master bedrooms features a king-size bed, en-suite bathroom, and private balcony with views of the island landscape. One bedroom also provides direct access to the pool terrace. The bathrooms feature a mix of walk-in showers and a freestanding bathtub for a relaxing end to the day. A guest bathroom is also available. Outdoors, enjoy the private infinity pool, sun deck, and lush garden—perfect for peaceful mornings or sunset gatherings. A BBQ grill and outdoor seating create a comfortable space to enjoy open-air dining. With room-darkening shades, TV, fire extinguisher, and first aid kit, the villa is thoughtfully prepared for a comfortable and easy stay. Ideal for couples, friends, or families looking for style, privacy, and views. Security Deposit Notice
A refundable security deposit of 10,000 THB is required upon check-in. The deposit will be returned in full at check-out, provided no damages or incidental charges apply.
apartments.address: 51, 7, Wok tum, Koh Phangan, Surat Thani 84280, Thailand

apartments.name: Mamad Sunny Hilltop Hideaway
apartments.shortDescription: ברוכים הבאים לדירת עליית גג -מוארת ומעוצבת בקפידה, המציעה נוף הררי מרגיע ואווירה שלווה במושב דתי קטן ומקסים. הדירה משלבת נוחות ופונקציונליות, והיא אידיאלית למשפחות, זוגות או קבוצות חברים המחפשים חופשה פסטורלית ונעימה…
apartments.fullDescription:
ברוכים הבאים לדירת עליית גג -מוארת ומעוצבת בקפידה, המציעה נוף הררי מרגיע ואווירה שלווה במושב דתי קטן ומקסים. הדירה משלבת נוחות ופונקציונליות, והיא אידיאלית למשפחות, זוגות או קבוצות חברים המחפשים חופשה פסטורלית ונעימה בצפון. חלל המגורים הרחב כולל ספה נוחה, פינת אוכל וטלוויזיית 55 אינץ'. חלונות גדולים וחלונות סקיילייט ממלאים את הדירה באור טבעי ומדגישים את העיצוב הנקי והמרווח. המטבח הפתוח מצויד לחלוטין – מקרר, תנור, כיריים, מיקרוגל, קומקום, מכונת נספרסו, פלטת שבת ומיחם – כך שהוא מתאים גם לשהות קצרה וגם לאורחים שומרי שבת. בדירה שני חדרי שינה נעימים:
• חדר אחד עם שתי מיטות יהודיות נפרדות וחדר רחצה צמוד
• חדר נוסף עם ארבע מיטות יהודיות נפרדות שני חדרי הרחצה כוללים מקלחון מודרני, כיור ושירותים – מה שמבטיח פרטיות ונוחות לכל אורח. ביציאה מהדירה מחכה לכם חצר מטופחת עם פרגולה מוצלת ואזור ישיבה – המקום המושלם להירגע, ליהנות מהאוויר הצח ומהנוף הפתוח. הערה חשובה: הדירה נמצאת ביישוב דתי. לא ניתן לבצע צ'ק-אין במהלך שבתות וחגים יהודיים. Welcome to this bright and thoughtfully designed attic apartment, offering peaceful mountain views and a relaxing atmosphere in a charming religious village. This inviting unit blends comfort and functionality, making it ideal for families, friends, or couples seeking a serene countryside escape. The spacious living area features a comfortable sofa, dining space, and a large 55-inch TV. Skylights and wide windows fill the space with natural light, highlighting the clean, airy design. The open kitchen is fully equipped with a refrigerator, oven, stove, microwave, kettle, Nespresso machine, Shabbat plate, and Sabbath hot water urn—making it suitable for both short stays and Shabbat-observant guests. The apartment includes two cozy bedrooms: one with two single Jewish beds and an ensuite bathroom, and another with four single Jewish beds. Both bathrooms feature modern walk-in showers, a sink, and a toilet, ensuring comfort and privacy for every guest. Step outside to a well-kept yard with a shaded pergola and comfortable seating area—an inviting spot to unwind and enjoy the open green views. Important note: The apartment is located in a religious village. Check-ins are not available during Shabbat or Jewish holidays.

apartments.shortDescription: Welcome to your serene beachfront retreat in Koh Phangan’s most sought-after area — Wok Tum and Hing Kong. This elegant two-bedroom villa combines tropical charm with modern comfort, offering breathtaking sea views and…
apartments.fullDescription:
Welcome to your serene beachfront retreat in Koh Phangan’s most sought-after area — Wok Tum and Hing Kong. This elegant two-bedroom villa combines tropical charm with modern comfort, offering breathtaking sea views and a private pool just steps from the sand. Warm tones, natural textures, and gentle lighting create an inviting atmosphere throughout. The open-plan living and dining area connects seamlessly to the terrace, where floor-to-ceiling glass doors invite ocean breezes and stunning sunsets. The fully equipped kitchen includes a stove, oven, dishwasher, and everything you need for an effortless stay. The master bedroom features a king-size bed, while the second bedroom offers two double beds with direct pool access and a private balcony — perfect for quiet morning coffees or evening relaxation. The villa includes a main bathroom with a walk-in shower and a separate guest toilet for added convenience. Spend your afternoons lounging by the private pool, dining al fresco on the terrace, or taking a few barefoot steps to the beach for golden-hour walks. Whether you’re a couple, family, or a small group of friends, this villa promises a tranquil island experience infused with ’s signature comfort and style. Security Deposit Notice
A refundable security deposit of 10,000 THB is required upon check-in. The deposit will be returned in full at check-out, provided no damages or incidental charges apply.
amenities: essentials (towels, pillows, bed linen, soap, toilet paper)

apartments.name: Mamad Sunny Rooftop Poolside Apt Panoramic Views
apartments.shortDescription: This spacious four-bedroom apartment offers a relaxed stay with panoramic views of the Red Sea and the surrounding mountains. Designed for up to eight guests, the 120 sqm space combines indoor comfort with a private…
apartments.fullDescription: This spacious four-bedroom apartment offers a relaxed stay with panoramic views of the Red Sea and the surrounding mountains. Designed for up to eight guests, the 120 sqm space combines indoor comfort with a private rooftop outdoor area, perfect for enjoying Eilat’s sunny climate. The living area features a comfortable sofa and a 70” Smart TV, creating an easygoing space to unwind after a day by the sea. Adjacent to the living room, the dining area seats up to eight guests, ideal for shared meals or relaxed evenings together. The fully equipped kitchen includes a refrigerator, oven, stove, microwave, toaster, kettle, and an espresso machine for easy breakfasts or casual cooking throughout your stay. All four bedrooms are furnished with queen beds, offering comfortable sleeping arrangements for families or groups. Two bathrooms provide added convenience: one with a bathtub and shower combination, and the other with a walk-in shower. A Mamad (reinforced room) is also included for additional safety. What truly sets this apartment apart is the rooftop yard. It features a private pool, two sun beds, a dining area, and a pool table-creating a private setting for relaxing afternoons and evenings while enjoying the mountain and bay views. A dedicated private parking spot adds extra convenience. Whether you’re here to explore or simply relax by the pool with a view, this apartment offers a well-balanced stay in a peaceful setting with all the essentials.

apartments.name: Dreamy Jungle Villa.
apartments.shortDescription: Experience a peaceful getaway in this beautifully designed 3-bedroom villa, where natural light, warm tones, and elegant simplicity create the perfect atmosphere for rest and relaxation. Surrounded by lush greenery, the…
apartments.fullDescription:
Experience a peaceful getaway in this beautifully designed 3-bedroom villa, where natural light, warm tones, and elegant simplicity create the perfect atmosphere for rest and relaxation. Surrounded by lush greenery, the villa offers garden views and a private pool—ideal for cooling off or spending a quiet afternoon outdoors. Inside, the open living room welcomes you with soft neutral décor, large windows, and a comfortable sectional that invites conversation and calm. The fully equipped kitchen features modern appliances including a refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, oven, kettle, espresso machine, and wine glasses—everything you need to enjoy home-style meals. Gather around the spacious dining table or take your meal outdoors under the shaded patio with stylish outdoor furniture and a full dining setup. Each of the three bedrooms is designed for comfort and tranquility, with crisp linens, ample storage, and garden-facing windows that bring the outdoors in. The villa also includes free parking and an iron for your convenience. Whether you’re relaxing by the pool, sipping coffee on the terrace, or exploring the nearby coastal charm of Rosh Hanikra, this villa blends thoughtful design with local character—offering a serene home base for your northern Israel adventure. Security Deposit Notice
A refundable security deposit of 10,000 THB is required upon check-in. The deposit will be returned in full at check-out, provided no damages or incidental charges apply.

apartments.name: Dreamy Jungle view villa
apartments.shortDescription: Experience island living at its finest in this elegant 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom villa nestled in the heart of Sri Thanu, Koh Phangan. Surrounded by lush jungle views, this private retreat blends natural beauty with refined…
apartments.fullDescription:
Experience island living at its finest in this elegant 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom villa nestled in the heart of Sri Thanu, Koh Phangan. Surrounded by lush jungle views, this private retreat blends natural beauty with refined design—offering the perfect balance of serenity and convenience. Step inside to a bright, open-concept living space featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, warm wooden accents, and carefully curated décor. The fully equipped kitchen includes a refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, oven, kettle, coffee maker, wine glasses, and blender—ideal for preparing meals to enjoy at the stylish dining table or outdoors amid tropical greenery. Each bedroom is thoughtfully designed for rest and comfort, complemented by two modern bathrooms and soft lighting that enhances the villa’s tranquil mood. Outside, unwind by the private infinity pool or take a refreshing outdoor shower surrounded by nature. The villa also offers free parking, outdoor furniture, and a peaceful setting just minutes from Sri Thanu’s vibrant cafes, yoga studios, and beaches. Perfect for families, couples, or small groups, this villa invites you to slow down, reconnect, and experience the relaxed rhythm of island life, where comfort meets tropical sophistication. Security Deposit Notice
A refundable security deposit of 10,000 THB is required upon check-in. The deposit will be returned in full at check-out, provided no damages or incidental charges apply.

apartments.name: Mamad Modern Garden Apartment in Eilat Promenade
apartments.shortDescription: Welcome to this brand-new 3-bedroom apartment located in a modern and refined residential complex near the heart of Eilat. Designed with comfort and functionality in mind, this home is ideal for families, couples, or…
apartments.fullDescription: Welcome to this brand-new 3-bedroom apartment located in a modern and refined residential complex near the heart of Eilat. Designed with comfort and functionality in mind, this home is ideal for families, couples, or friends looking for a relaxed stay close to the city’s main attractions. The apartment features a bright, contemporary interior with clean lines, soft neutral tones, and thoughtfully chosen furnishings. The living area is open and inviting, with comfortable seating and a 55-inch smart TV, perfect for unwinding after a day at the beach. Large windows bring in natural light and connect the space to the private yard, offering a pleasant spot to enjoy your morning coffee or a quiet evening outdoors. The fully equipped kitchen includes a dishwasher, oven, stove, microwave, toaster, kettle, Nespresso machine, and refrigerator—everything you need for easy home-style meals. For longer stays, the apartment also offers a washing machine and ample storage. One of the bedrooms includes a Mamad (safe room), adding an extra layer of security and peace of mind. Guests benefit from private underground parking and a prime location within walking distance to the beach promenade, beaches, restaurants, and shops, making it easy to explore Eilat on foot. A comfortable, stylish base for enjoying the city—modern living with a local feel.

apartments.name: Treetop Bliss Villas
apartments.shortDescription: Welcome to our modern villa in Koh Phangan, set above lush jungle treetops with calming ocean views. Just a short walk from the beach and only minutes from town, this villa offers the ideal balance of island nature and…
apartments.fullDescription:
Welcome to our modern villa in Koh Phangan, set above lush jungle treetops with calming ocean views. Just a short walk from the beach and only minutes from town, this villa offers the ideal balance of island nature and easy access to local cafés, restaurants, and sunset spots. Each of the three 3-bedroom villas in the complex comes with its own private infinity pool, ensuring complete privacy and a truly elevated island experience. All three bedrooms in every villa are master suites with en-suite bathrooms. One suite includes an outdoor bathtub overlooking the sea, while another opens directly to the pool—perfect for an early swim or enjoying the afternoon light. Large windows, warm wood elements, and soft neutral tones create a relaxed atmosphere throughout. The open-plan living area flows into the dining space and fully equipped kitchen, complete with oven, stove, refrigerator, microwave, kettle, coffee maker, and all essential cookware. Thoughtful lighting and natural textures make the space inviting for meals and downtime. Step outside to your private infinity pool framed by palm trees, outdoor seating, and a balcony ideal for quiet mornings or sunset viewing. With exercise equipment, safety essentials, and comfortable indoor–outdoor living, the villas suit families, couples, and groups. Each villa accommodates up to 6 guests—18 guests total when booking the entire complex. Security Deposit Notice
A refundable security deposit of 10,000 THB is required upon check-in. The deposit will be returned in full at check-out, provided no damages or incidental charges apply.

apartments.name: Siam Serenity Villa.
apartments.shortDescription: Set in one of Sritanu’s most peaceful corners, Siam Serenity Villa offers a modern, calm escape surrounded by lush Koh Phangan jungle. Designed with clean lines, warm wood accents, and abundant natural light, the villa…
apartments.fullDescription: Set in one of Sritanu’s most peaceful corners, Siam Serenity Villa offers a modern, calm escape surrounded by lush Koh Phangan jungle. Designed with clean lines, warm wood accents, and abundant natural light, the villa blends comfort, style, and a serene connection to nature. The open-plan living area flows directly to the patio, creating effortless indoor–outdoor living. A fully equipped kitchen—with oven, stove, espresso machine, blender, cookware, and a large dining table—makes meal preparation easy, whether it’s breakfast before the beach or a quiet dinner at home. All three bedrooms are bright and thoughtfully arranged. Two rooms feature comfortable double beds with soft tones and room-darkening shades, while the third has two single beds—perfect for families or friends. Both bathrooms include walk-in showers, clean finishes, and practical storage. Step outside to your private overflowing pool, framed by tropical plants for full privacy. A shaded seating corner and sunlit deck offer the perfect spots to lounge, read, or enjoy peaceful mornings surrounded by the jungle. With 142 sqm across two floors, dedicated parking, and essentials—including ironing equipment, TV, coffee setup, and fire extinguisher—the villa is designed for comfortable modern living. Whether you’re working remotely, exploring Koh Phangan, or simply unwinding, Siam Serenity Villa provides a serene base that combines modern comfort with the natural charm of island life.

apartments.fullDescription: Welcome to a spacious two-bedroom apartment with breathtaking Mediterranean sea views from the 26th floor. Enjoy uninterrupted vistas in a calm, light-filled space designed for comfort, relaxation, and a strong connection to the coastline. The open living area features comfortable seating, a large dining table, and a 55-inch Smart TV with Netflix. Floor-to-ceiling windows lead to a wide private balcony, perfect for morning coffee or sunsets with panoramic sea views. The kitchen is fully equipped for short or extended stays, including oven, stove, dishwasher, microwave, Nespresso machine, kettle, and complete cookware—practical, functional, and ready to use. Both bedrooms ensure rest and privacy: the main bedroom has a king bed, while the second bedroom offers a double bed. Two modern bathrooms with walk-in showers comfortably serve up to four guests. Guests can enjoy shared building amenities such as a swimming pool, gym, elevator, free private parking, and 24/7 security. Located within walking distance of the beach, restaurants, and bars, this apartment offers a perfect combination of convenience, comfort, and a truly panoramic sea-view experience.

apartments.shortDescription: Welcome to your stay in Eilat—this brand-new 120 sqm, 3-bedroom apartment sits inside a luxurious new residential complex, just a short walk to the beach promenade and Eilat’s main beaches. Located on the 2nd floor with…
apartments.fullDescription: Welcome to your stay in Eilat—this brand-new 120 sqm, 3-bedroom apartment sits inside a luxurious new residential complex, just a short walk to the beach promenade and Eilat’s main beaches. Located on the 2nd floor with a quiet courtyard view, it’s an easy place to settle in, with private free underground parking included. Inside, you’ll find a bright, modern layout with a comfortable living room, dining area, and a fully equipped kitchen designed for real stays. Large windows with soft curtains bring in natural light, while warm neutrals and clean lines create a calm, contemporary feel. After a day out, unwind on the sofa (which converts to a single sofa bed) and stream your favorites on the 55” Smart TV. The kitchen has everything you need for breakfast at home or a relaxed dinner in, including a dishwasher, oven, stove, microwave, toaster, kettle, Nespresso machine, and a full-size refrigerator. A washing machine is also available, which is especially handy for longer visits. Sleeping is set up for up to 7 guests with two queen bedrooms, one double bedroom, and the single sofa bed in the living room. There are two bathrooms for extra comfort: one with a bathtub and shower combination, and one ensuite with a shower. For added safety and peace of mind, the apartment includes a Mamad (safe room).

apartments.name: Baan Sook Villa Bright Private Pool
apartments.shortDescription: A bright villa with a stunning pool and a sunny, spacious terrace. "Baan Sook means “House of Happiness” in Thai - a home created for comfort, connection, and happy memories. This private, western-standard villa is…
apartments.fullDescription: A bright villa with a stunning pool and a sunny, spacious terrace. "Baan Sook means “House of Happiness” in Thai - a home created for comfort, connection, and happy memories. This private, western-standard villa is located in a quiet, green neighborhood in Srithanu Hills - one of Koh Phangan’s most desirable areas. The villa feels peaceful and private, yet excellent restaurants, cafés, massage studios, and local shops are all within walking distance. It’s a rare mix of privacy and convenience. Baan Sook is designed with the same care and comfort we would want in our own home - from soft sofas to quality mattresses and linens. The villa offers 140 sqm of indoor living space and over 250 sqm of outdoor areas, including a private pool, shaded terrace, and garden - giving everyone plenty of room to relax. High ceilings and a bright open-plan living area create a comfortable space to spend time together. The living room includes cozy seating, a dining table, and a 75-inch Smart TV. Wide sliding doors bring in natural light throughout the day. The modern kitchen is fully equipped for short or long stays, with an oven, stove, microwave, dishwasher, refrigerator, coffee machine, and complete cookware. A washer and dryer add everyday convenience. There are three bedrooms, two with en-suite bathrooms. The master bedroom opens directly to the pool. The two additional bedrooms have direct access to the garden. Bed setup includes one king bed, one queen bed, and two single beds that can be joined into a king upon request. Outside, enjoy the large private pool, garden, and shaded terrace for relaxed mornings or quiet evenings. One of the island’s best massage spas, Thisarat Health Massage, and the popular restaurant Pum Pui are just a few minutes’ walk away. The Chabad House is also within walking distance, while Hin Kong Beach, Zen Beach, and other local spots are just a short drive away - offering an easy and authentic island experience. Private on-site parking is included.
amenities: essentials (towels, pillows, bed linen, soap, toilet paper)

apartments.name: Garden& Rooftop Beachfront Luxury in Shavei Tzion
apartments.shortDescription: Situated just 50 meters from the shoreline, this 95sqm designer residence offers a sophisticated escape in the heart of Shavei Tzion. Combining modern architectural lines with the effortless vibe of the Mediterranean,…
apartments.fullDescription: Situated just 50 meters from the shoreline, this 95sqm designer residence offers a sophisticated escape in the heart of Shavei Tzion. Combining modern architectural lines with the effortless vibe of the Mediterranean, this first-floor retreat is designed for guests who prioritize both style and proximity to the waves. The lifestyle here revolves around the water; you can start your day with sea-view dining on your private balcony or take the private elevator to the building’s crown jewel—an expansive rooftop pool and sun deck. Inside, a bright living and dining area features a comfortable sofa and a 58” Smart TV. The fully equipped kitchen includes an oven, stove, microwave, espresso machine, and all the essentials for preparing meals at home. The apartment accommodates up to six guests across two bedrooms: one queen and one with two singles plus a sofa bed. Two bathrooms with walk-in showers provide convenience for families or groups. A safe room (Mamad) adds peace of mind. The highlight of this property is the rooftop pool: accessible via a private elevator and Shared with only one other elite suite. The rooftop offers sunbeds, seating areas, and a grill, all overlooking the sea—a perfect spot for relaxation, entertainment, or enjoying unforgettable sunsets. Step outside and you’re just 50 meters from Shavei Zion Beach, home to a local surfing club. Restaurants, pubs, and nearby activities are all within easy reach, while free on-site parking makes exploring the area simple. This apartment blends modern living with a true local seaside experience, offering a bright, easygoing, and thoughtfully designed retreat for families or friends looking to enjoy the coast in comfort.

apartments.name: Mamad Chic and Comfort stay on Iconic Sheinkin St
apartments.shortDescription: This well-lit apartment on Shenkin Street places you in the heart of Tel Aviv’s vibrant city center. Located on the first floor of a modern building with an elevator, the apartment is thoughtfully designed to combine…
apartments.fullDescription: This well-lit apartment on Shenkin Street places you in the heart of Tel Aviv’s vibrant city center. Located on the first floor of a modern building with an elevator, the apartment is thoughtfully designed to combine comfort, style, and practicality. The interiors are bright and welcoming, featuring clean lines, warm touches, and contemporary furnishings that create a comfortable setting after a day exploring the city. The apartment offers two comfortable bedrooms, one of which serves as a secure Mamad room for added safety. The spacious living room is ideal for relaxing or socializing, while the dining area can also function as a convenient workspace.
